title: #4 - How do I create listings?
bodyHtml:
Different ways of creating listings

In this section, you’ll upload the product listings available from your company. 

One listing equals one product or item that you wish to sell in Back Market.  

 

Note that you must provide a minimum of 5 listings, each with at least 1 product in stock. This requirement must be met for our Activation Team to proceed with activating your account.

 

You can create your listings in 3 different ways:

 

Manually from the Back Office: You can create new listings 1 at a time directly through the Back Office. This method is suitable for sellers with a smaller inventory or those who prefer to input product details individually for greater control. To do this, go to “Listings” > “Create new listing”.

 

Search the name of the product you want to sell:

 

 

 

Add the product or a similar product (color changes, capacity, etc.).

 

For more information on how to create listings visit here: Create my listing on Back Market's Back Office

 

In batches with a CSV file: For sellers with a larger inventory, creating listings in batches via a CSV file is a more efficient option. This method allows sellers to prepare a spreadsheet with all the necessary listing details and upload it to create multiple listings at once.

 

For more information on how to create listings with CSV file here: Create my listing with CSV files

 

Via API: This is the most automated method, suitable for sellers with technical capabilities or those using third-party software for inventory management. Listings can be created and updated programmatically through Back Market's API, facilitating real-time inventory synchronization and management.

 

Learn more about uploading listings via API here: Create my listing with API

 

To learn more about how to set up your Back Office account, go to the next article.

 

REMINDER: 

Your listings and your account will appear as “Offline” until your account will be validated by the Activation team.

 

Once you have completed all the sections of the onboarding, please send an email to activation-eu@backmarket.com

 

Need help? Don't hesitate to reach out to the Back Market team at activation-eu@backmarket.com
